head.title: Employment & HR | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: Employment law and HR support for employers. Get practical advice on settlement agreements, tribunals, disciplinaries, compliance and more.
head.ogDescription: Employment law and HR support for employers. Get practical advice on settlement agreements, tribunals, disciplinaries, compliance and more.

blocks.html:
Employment & HR

Our expert Employment team advises employers of all sizes on everything from Settlement Agreements and disciplinaries to discrimination claims and Employment Tribunal defence. We work closely with owner-managed businesses and HR teams, giving clear, practical advice that helps you manage risk and stay compliant without slowing you down. We know how challenging it can be to keep up with ever-changing employment law. That’s why we specialise in helping owner-managers and HR professionals make confident, informed decisions.

For businesses
Employment & HR

Services

We’ve got a strong track record of success, including running large-scale settlement clinics, supporting high-net-worth individuals, and leading complex litigation. Whether you need support with negotiations, claims, or compliance, we’ll work with you to get the right result for your business.

Speak to an expert

Breach of Contract and Unlawful Deduction from Wages for Employers

We help employers prevent disputes from arising, and act fast to resolve any breach of contract or unlawful deduction claims when they do.

Commercial Agents

We help businesses across Uganda structure agency relationships that are clear, compliant and commercially sound.

Contracts of Employment

We make sure employers get their employment terms right from the start, in line with the Employment Rights Act 1996.

Directors' Service Agreements

Bringing in a new director or reviewing your current terms? We’ll guide you through it all, making sure everything’s clear, compliant and built to last.

Disciplinary Proceedings

Confident handling of disciplinary issues protects your business from tribunal claims, reputational damage and disruption to team morale.

Discrimination

Facing a discrimination issue or want to reduce your risk? We can help you get it right.

Employment Policies and Staff Handbooks

We’ll draft, review, and defend your employment policies so you can lead with clarity and stay legally secure.

Flexible Working

Flexible working is a legal right in the UK, and getting it right matters for your people and your business.

Gig Economy

Moonstone helps employers navigate the gig economy with confidence, clarity, and legal certainty.

Grievances

We’ll help you manage complaints fairly and decisively, with advice that protects your business and your people.

Immigration

We help employers manage business immigration with practical advice that keeps you compliant and ready to hire globally.

IR35

When sensitive workplace issues arise, you need a swift, discreet and unbiased process.

Managing Sickness Absence

Unsure how to manage sickness absence fairly and lawfully? We can help you take the right steps.

Performance Management

Dealing with under-performance? Get clear, compliant support that helps you manage issues fairly and reduce legal risk.

Recruitment

Hiring the right people carries legal risk, so it's important to get the process right from the start.

Redundancy

We help manage redundancy with care, clarity, and legal confidence, from initial planning to final decisions.

Restrictive Covenants

When employees move on, your business shouldn’t be at risk. Discover how enforceable restrictive covenants can protect what you’ve built.

Restructuring

Thinking about restructuring your business? Done right, it can bring clarity, unlock growth and strengthen your position for the future. Done wrong, it can create costly legal and commercial risks.

Settlement Agreements and Protected Conversations

Need a clean exit with an employee? Settlement agreements and protected conversations can help you move forward and provide a clean, legally protected break.

Transfer of Undertakings (TUPE)

Understand your obligations and protect your business when employees transfer under TUPE.

Tribunal Representation

Facing a claim against your business? Early legal advice can make all the difference. we can help protect your position.

Unfair and Wrongful Dismissal

If a former employee brings a claim, we’ll act fast to defend your position by guiding you through the process and keeping risks to a minimum.

Whistleblowing

We’ll help you respond quickly and carefully to whistleblowing concerns, reducing legal risk and reputational fallout with clear, practical advice.

Working Time Regulations

We’ll help you navigate tricky issues around shifts, holiday pay or rest breaks, so you stay compliant, support your people, and keep things running smoothly.

Experts in every area

Call us today

Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Georgia was incredibly helpful throughout the process of reaching a settlement with a previous employer. Georgia took the time to understand my personal situation and provided clear, considerate, and professional guidance at every stage. Her support made a complex process much easier to navigate, and I felt reassured knowing I was in capable hands.
Employment Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Chris is a great listener, clear communicator and, in my opinion, a genuinely good, kind human being. I have no hesitation in recommending Moonstone in Kampala for any legal matters you may have; you'll be in good hands.
Employment Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
I have dealt with Chris Allen recently concerning some rather upsetting and extremely delicate matters. Chris and the team have proved to be reassuring, down to earth and absolute consummate professionals.
Employment Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Moonstone helped us think beyond the sessions by supporting us to consider how the legislative changes translate into day to day behaviours and what this means for our culture in anticipation for our policy to be launched. This has supported follow on training delivery internally surrounding misogyny, misogynoir and trans-misogyny.
Employment Training Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
We had an excellent experience working with Moonstone. From the moment we reached out to request training, they responded quickly and took the time to meet with us early on to understand our needs and the wider organisational context. They were patient and flexible as we worked through our planning.
Employment Training Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Ellie was absolutely amazing through the whole process. She made me feel at ease and was very efficient at replying to my emails and queries. I would also like to say a thank you to Jemma who was the first one I engaged with and made me feel comfortable and less anxious.
Employment Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
I worked with Tom during a very stressful and time-sensitive settlement, and I’m genuinely so grateful for his support. From the start, he was calm, practical and incredibly thorough, which made a huge difference at a point when everything felt overwhelming.
Employment Client

The service was 11 out of 10! Ellie kept me on the straight and narrow. She navigated the legal side and the emotional side incredibly well. She advised me brilliantly and I couldn’t be happier with that

Employment Client

Outstanding service from start to finish. The team’s work rate, speed of response, and legal knowledge were second to none. They consistently went above and beyond to get things done efficiently and with care. Special thanks to Richard P and Pete K for their exceptional support – true professionals!
